title: The Msk plushies
description: A silly plushie mod based on masked characters
body:
This is a fan mod of the content crator masked
The mod is made to add plushie blocks of characters friends and some members of the masked community.

Masked can be found here:
Twitch:[https://www.twitch.tv/masked_idiotlol](https://www.twitch.tv/masked_idiotlol)
(you can also join the discord server from the link tab)


What to expect from this mod:
![Me on a fox :3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/340a2968ec08d171098c0279f1bdb7adc1b0b2b4.png)![All the plushies ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed68b29a123c0a502e603c42427b0d9f0017b210.png)

The plushies you can find are:
* Msk plush
* Greg plush
* Masked plush
* Ryan plush
* Cat plush
* Lolahh/storm plush
* Sludgy plush

Crafting recipes:
